'''Zanita Cobral''' was the true leader of the [[Cobral family]] and the mother of [[Rutin Cobral|Rutin]], [[Solan Cobral|Solan]], and [[Bard Cobral]]. She committed [[Death/Legends|suicide]] in [[40 BBY/Legends|40 BBY]] after failing to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] her daughter-in-law, [[Lena Cobral]], who had testified before the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] earlier that day.
